applicationComponents.name: Composable Core Banking Platform
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Composable Core Banking Platform service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Operations and Product Console
applicationServices.description: Primary browser workspace for configuring banking products, monitoring operations, and managing controlled change.

applicationServices.name: Core Banking APIs
applicationServices.description: External-facing APIs for product, account, and transaction services used by channels and enterprise systems.

applicationServices.name: Migration and Platform Dashboard
applicationServices.description: Operational visibility for migration waves, service health, and platform utilization.

applicationServices.name: Event and Integration Layer
applicationServices.description: Reusable event and integration layer for payments, CRM, general ledger, and surrounding banking services.

applicationComponents.name: Digital Lending Operating Layer
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Digital Lending Operating Layer service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Lending Configuration and Servicing Workspace
applicationServices.description: Browser workspace for launching loan products, managing servicing workflows, and controlling exceptions.

applicationServices.name: Origination and Partner API Layer
applicationServices.description: APIs used by direct channels, brokers, merchants, and embedded-finance partners for origination and servicing actions.

applicationServices.name: Portfolio and Unit Economics Dashboard
applicationServices.description: Analytics surface for portfolio growth, delinquency, servicing efficiency, and cohort economics.

applicationServices.name: Servicing Automation API
applicationServices.description: Internal and ecosystem API surface for repayment changes, collections actions, and loan-servicing workflows.

applicationComponents.name: Embedded Finance Partner Platform
applicationComponents.description: Application component supporting the Embedded Finance Partner Platform service landscape.

applicationServices.name: Partner Operations Portal
applicationServices.description: Operational workspace for onboarding partners, resolving exceptions, and managing live partner programs.

applicationServices.name: Partner Developer APIs
applicationServices.description: Public APIs for partners embedding accounts, lending, payments, and servicing flows into their own products.

applicationServices.name: Webhook and Event Network
applicationServices.description: Real-time event and webhook distribution for embedded-finance partners.

applicationServices.name: Partner Performance and Revenue Dashboard
applicationServices.description: Dashboard for partner go-live velocity, adoption, revenue contribution, and operating health.

applicationInteractions.description: Composable Core Banking Platform exchanges domain information with Digital Lending Operating Layer as part of the end-to-end operating model.
Digital Lending Operating Layer exchanges domain information with Embedded Finance Partner Platform as part of the end-to-end operating model.
